_comment: ScreenScraper (screenscraper.fr) backend config for retrovault.providers.scraper. 'platforms' maps each RetroVault system id to a ScreenScraper 'systemeid'. 'media_types' maps a RetroVault media kind to the ScreenScraper media 'type' names to try, in order of preference. IDs below are ScreenScraper's documented system ids.

libretro._comment: libretro-thumbnails: account-free, name-matched static images at <base>/<system>/<Named_*>/<game name>.png. 'systems' maps a RetroVault system id to the libretro system folder; 'media_paths' maps a RetroVault media kind to the libretro subfolder.
